title: ADR-005 must make levels the only public and AI-facing contract
summary: The reopened design is viable only if Level 1/2/3/3+ and phase-parent remain the sole public vocabulary. Preset, capability, and kind are internal manifest/scaffolder implementation terms.
evidence: .opencode/specs/system-spec-kit/026-graph-and-context-optimization/010-template-levels/002-template-greenfield-redesign/research/iterations/iteration-010.md required --level, SPECKIT_LEVEL, level frontmatter, and Level taxonomy to remain public
Iteration-007 proposed --preset help text and validator messages that leak internal taxonomy
recommendation: Add ADR-005 as accepted and enforce a no-leak rule across CLI help, command docs, skill text, validator messages, logs, generated frontmatter, and AI-readable metadata.

title: resolveLevelContract(level) is the invariant-preserving bridge
summary: A public level-shaped resolver lets create.sh and validators use the internal manifest without teaching users or AI prompts about internal rows or composition terms.
evidence: The requested API signature is resolveLevelContract(level: '1' | '2' | '3' | '3+' | 'phase'): LevelContract
recommendation: Create .opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/templates/level-contract-resolver.ts and expose only requiredCoreDocs, requiredAddonDocs, lazyAddonDocs, sectionGates, and frontmatterMarkerLevel.

title: Iteration-007 create.sh diff must be inverted back to --level
summary: The earlier proposal made --preset primary, changed help examples, emitted PRESET JSON/stdout, and wrote raw template contract internals. Every one of those public-adjacent changes violates the invariant.
evidence: iteration-007 lines 83-100 changed help and examples to manifest preset language
iteration-007 lines 1270-1280 changed JSON/stdout from DOC_LEVEL to PRESET
recommendation: Keep DOC_LEVEL, --level, Level-shaped stdout, Level-shaped JSON, and hidden internal level_contract variables.

title: Validator output must be level-shaped or taxonomy-neutral
summary: Validators are read by humans and AI completion gates, so messages such as active manifest profiles or choose a lighter manifest preset are public leaks.
evidence: iteration-007 proposed check-files.sh message All required files present for manifest contract
iteration-007 proposed check-section-counts.sh remediation choose a lighter manifest preset
recommendation: Use messages like All required files present for Level 3, Level 3 packet missing required file: decision-record.md, and Internal template contract could not be resolved for Level 3.

title: research.md needs a workflow invariance addendum before final synthesis
summary: The current synthesis says levels disappear, levels are eliminated, and presets are user-facing. Under the new constraint, the correct framing is that level folders disappear while the public level workflow stays.
evidence: research.md:7 says Killer feature 1: levels disappear
recommendation: Insert the Workflow Invariance Addendum near the top of research.md during the final synthesis pass and revise the listed lines.

summary: ADR-005 drafted as an accepted workflow-invariance decision.
before: ADR-004 allowed raw template_contract frontmatter/metadata language and iteration 9 left public taxonomy ambiguous.
after: ADR-005 narrows the design: levels are the sole public contract; preset/capability/kind names are strictly internal.

summary: Public resolver API specified with invariant-safe names.
before: template_contract_for_preset and manifest helper APIs exposed internal terminology at shell boundaries.
after: resolveLevelContract(level) and resolve_level_contract <level> expose only level contract fields.

summary: Iteration-007 diffs revised from preset-first to level-only.
before: create.sh help, examples, JSON, stdout, validators, and helper errors used preset/manifest/capability/kind language.
after: create.sh and validators keep --level, DOC_LEVEL, Level messages, file-only details, and remapped internal errors.

summary: research.md synthesis correction plan identified by line.
before: research.md states levels disappear and public presets replace levels.
after: research.md should state duplicated templates/level_N folders disappear while the --level N workflow remains public.
